title: HoneycombCutting
description: Adds a stonecutting recipe for honeycomb blocks.
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a99781f740cc5b466452c7d396b29615d8e1af44.png)
[![discord](https://dcbadge.vercel.app/api/server/Mec6yNQ9B7?style=flat)](https://www.oth3r.one/discord) 

Adds a new recipe for the stonecutter that makes the honeycomb block cuttable into 4 honeycomb items.
